description_long: This object is a single Hass avocado with a dark green, pebbly skin and an overall pear-like shape. The surface is speckled with small yellow-green dots and a few darker spots, giving it a natural, slightly mottled appearance. One end features a small, brown stem remnant, while the other end is more rounded and smooth. A white oval sticker label is affixed to one side, displaying product and barcode information, indicating it is a store-bought item from Waitrose. The avocado's skin appears firm and unbroken, with no visible cuts or openings. The object is isolated against a plain white background, with no other items or surfaces visible.
description: A dark green, speckled Hass avocado with a store label and a small brown stem, isolated on a white background.
description_view_0: The avocado is seen from a side angle, showing its smooth, rounded base and the speckled green skin with subtle yellow dots.
description_view_1: This view highlights the white oval sticker label with product and barcode details, as well as the elongated, tapered end of the avocado.
description_view_2: The small brown stem remnant is visible at the top, along with the sticker label and a more rounded profile of the avocado.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the avocado is shown, displaying the uninterrupted, speckled green skin and the overall pear-like shape.
attribute_skin_blemishes: small dark spots and minor speckling
